name: Aurelia Floor Lamp - LIT4334 - Gold - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the aurelia 63.5 inch gold metal floor lamp. This eye-catching piece adds a touch of elegance to any interior. Made from metal, its sleek gold finish offers a subtle yet striking accent without overwhelming your decor. The height of the lamp provides ample lighting, making it a great choice for living rooms, bedrooms, or reading nooks. Its timeless design complements various styles, from modern to classic. With its sturdy construction, aurelia is a functional piece that adds both light and beauty to your home. Transform your environment with this sophisticated floor lamp.
